Options

Free is already enough. Pro adds organization automation.

English 한국어

Use a Pro key to unlock advanced save rules on this browser only. No sign-in required.

Free: save + images + replies + duplicates Pro: filename rules + folder routing
Pro active: saved posts now follow your vault organization rules.
Filename Pattern Pro
{date}-{author}-{first_sentence}
Save Subfolder Pattern Pro
Inbox/{date}
Unlock organization rules
